rationale:
OSS classification: all changed files live under web/src/ (web/src/views/TestDemo.vue, web/src/composables/shared/router.ts, web/src/layouts/MainLayout.vue) — no enterprise paths touched. No enterprise keywords in path or symbol names.

Skip gate: not an enterprise feature; no explicit opt-out (feature_hint.txt and trigger_comment.txt are both empty); change IS user-facing — adds a new /test-demo route with a fully interactive UI page (fruit select, cascading country→city selects, mode toggle with Basic/Advanced modes, conditional priority select, and a conditional combined banner that appears only when fruit=Cherry AND mode=Advanced AND priority=High). All interactive/asserted elements carry data-test attributes ready for Playwright selectors.

Area assignment: GeneralTests — the page is a standalone demo surface not tied to any specific product area (Logs/Metrics/Traces/Dashboards/etc.), making GeneralTests the best fit. The playwright_group 'GeneralTests' maps to the tests/ui-testing/playwright-tests/GeneralTests/ folder in the CI matrix.

No existing tests were found in the diff (no files under tests/ui-testing/playwright-tests/ changed).
